metadata.title: Hung Nguyen — Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Versatile Full Stack Developer with over 6 years of hands-on experience, having deployed 10 production systems across e-commerce, SaaS, enterprise telephony, advertising, edtech, lifestyle, and AI-powered platforms.
metadata.keywords: Full Stack Developer, Laravel, React, Vue, Node.js, AdonisJS, E-commerce, AI Engineering, OpenAI, Vietnam, Hanoi

hero.headline: Crafting High-Performance & Scalable Web Applications
hero.subheadline: Versatile Full Stack Developer with over 6 years of hands-on experience, having deployed 10 production systems — e-commerce, SaaS, enterprise telephony, advertising, edtech, and lifestyle.

companies.headline: Trusted by Leading Companies Across Vietnam and Japan
companies.subtitle: Delivering production-grade solutions for industry leaders in product and outsourcing environments

about.headline: From Security Foundations to Product Engineering
about.subtitle: B.Eng. Information Security graduate turned Full Stack Developer — shipping real products across diverse domains since 2019.
about.bio: B.Eng. Information Security turned Full Stack Developer — shipping real products across diverse domains since 2019.

step1.title: Information Security Graduate
step1.description: Graduated with a B.Eng. in Information Security from the Academy of Cryptography Techniques (KMA), Vietnam, building a strong foundation in secure systems and analytical thinking.

step2.title: Full Stack Developer at VCCorp
step2.description: Started at Vietnam's largest media technology company, contributing to Bizfly Email — an enterprise-grade bulk email delivery system.

step3.title: Full Stack Developer at CO-WELL Asia
step3.description: Delivered outsourcing projects for Japanese clients — Ad-Start advertising platform, TobilaPhone Biz enterprise telephony, and Onsight-php event management system.

step4.title: Full Stack Developer at Coolmate
step4.description: Developed and maintained Coolmate.me, Vietnam's leading men's fashion e-commerce platform — handling high-volume transactions

step5.title: Remote / Freelance Developer
step5.description: Transitioned to remote freelance work for CIT Group (Vietnam) and JAVIS Co., Ltd. (Japan) — shipping Vanda, Heva, Vương Kim Bảo, and Jindo App.

productMindset.title: Product Mindset
productMindset.description: Proven ability to deliver across both product and outsourcing environments, with every feature tied to measurable business outcomes.

problemSolving.title: Problem Solving
problemSolving.description: Diagnosed complex bugs, refactored legacy code, and optimized API response times for long-term maintainability.

shipping.title: Shipping Real Products
shipping.description: 10 production systems shipped — from high-volume e-commerce, edtech, and lifestyle apps to enterprise telephony and AI-powered platforms.

learning.title: Continuous Learning
learning.description: Early adopter of AI-assisted development with OpenAI API, Claude Code, Cursor IDE, and GitHub Copilot.

techStack.headline: Technology Stack
techStack.subtitle: Production-proven tools across backend, frontend, databases, DevOps, and AI

projects.headline: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: 10 shipped production systems built for real users and real business impact

vanecom.name: Vanda (Vanecom)
vanecom.description: Vietnamese e-commerce platform with web and mobile interfaces. Integrated OpenAI API for AI-driven product recommendations and automated customer support.

heva.name: Heva
heva.description: Leading Vietnamese home service booking app — hair, beauty, and mom & baby care at home by verified professionals. AdonisJS APIs, realtime chat via Socket.IO, and flexible payments — live on the App Store.

vuongkimbao.name: Vương Kim Bảo
vuongkimbao.description: Comprehensive feng shui lookup platform helping users explore fortune, interpret destiny by birth date, and discover feng shui items suited to their element. Available on the App Store.
highlights: Feng shui product recommendations by element
Laravel backend for Flutter mobile app

coolmate.name: Coolmate.me
coolmate.description: Leading Vietnamese men's fashion e-commerce platform handling high-volume daily transactions with dual frontend architecture.

jindo.name: Jindo App
jindo.description: Korean language learning app for Vietnamese users featuring interactive lessons, quizzes, and progress tracking.

adstart.name: Ad-Start
adstart.description: Centralized advertising management platform for Facebook and Google campaigns with automated ad creation and real-time performance dashboards.
highlights: Facebook Marketing & Google Ads API integration

onsight.name: Onsight-php
onsight.description: Event management platform for creating, scheduling, and tracking events with real-time updates and calendar integrations.
highlights: Real-time event updates and push notifications

tobilaphone.name: TobilaPhone Biz
tobilaphone.description: Enterprise telephony solution for filtering, blocking, and managing unwanted or spam calls with centralized admin dashboard.
highlights: Spam call filtering and blacklist management

bizfly.name: Bizfly Email
bizfly.description: Enterprise bulk email delivery system supporting scenario-based triggers, dynamic content personalization, and proactive spam-risk alerting.
highlights: MongoDB optimized for high-volume email logs

remoteoffer.name: Remote-Offer
remoteoffer.description: Recruitment platform for companies to post job listings, manage candidates, and publish company blogs with Stripe payment integration.
highlights: Stripe paid job postings and subscriptions

projectsPage.title: All Projects
projectsPage.description: 10 shipped production systems across e-commerce, SaaS, advertising, enterprise telephony, language learning, feng shui, and AI-powered platforms.

experience.headline: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: Building products across Vietnam and Japan — product companies and outsourcing

responsibilities: Built Vanda, an AI-powered Vietnamese e-commerce platform with OpenAI API integration for product recommendations and automated customer support
Developed Heva, a home service booking app for hair, beauty, and mom & baby care with Socket.IO live chat and payment integrations — live on the App Store
Built Vương Kim Bảo backend for the Flutter app — comprehensive feng shui lookup, birth date interpretation, and element-based product recommendations — live on the App Store
Developed Jindo App, a Korean language learning platform with interactive lessons, Firebase analytics, and 9Pay in-app subscriptions
Maintained and optimized Laravel-based backend systems for JAVIS Co., Ltd. (Japanese outsourcing company) — managed schema migrations, query optimization, and zero-downtime deployments
Utilized Claude Code, Cursor IDE, and GitHub Copilot to accelerate development across all active projects
achievements: Shipped Vanda with OpenAI-driven recommendations, Firebase live chat, and GiaoHangNhanh delivery tracking
Delivered Heva with AdonisJS high-performance APIs and realtime user–provider communication on iOS
Shipped Vương Kim Bảo with Laravel APIs powering destiny lookup and feng shui product matching
Delivered Jindo App with progress tracking, push notifications, and in-app purchase flows via 9Pay
Improved API response times and system stability for JAVIS Co., Ltd.
freelance.impact: Shipping AI-powered, edtech, lifestyle, and realtime mobile products for CIT Group while maintaining enterprise Laravel systems for JAVIS Co., Ltd.

responsibilities: Developed and maintained Coolmate.me, a leading Vietnamese men's fashion e-commerce platform handling high-volume daily transactions
Built Laravel backend for product management, order processing, online payments, inventory sync, and returns
Developed dynamic frontend interfaces using ReactJS, VueJS, and HTML/CSS/JS
Integrated Shopee API for cross-platform product synchronization and PortOne for secure, multi-method payment processing
Collaborated with the team to ensure a smooth user experience
achievements: Integrated Shopee API for cross-platform product synchronization
Integrated PortOne for secure, multi-method payment processing
Ensured smooth user experience on a high-volume transaction platform
coolmate.impact: Contributed to Vietnam's leading fashion e-commerce platform handling high-volume daily transactions.

responsibilities: Contributed to multiple outsourcing projects for Japanese clients across advertising, telephony, and event management
Built Ad-Start integrating Facebook Marketing API and Google Ads API
Developed TobilaPhone Biz enterprise call-filtering system using CakePHP
Built Onsight-php real-time event scheduling platform with Laravel and ReactJS
achievements: Delivered Ad-Start for automated campaign creation, tracking, and reporting
Built enterprise telephony solution with real-time call traffic monitoring
Delivered Onsight-php with interactive ReactJS calendar and real-time event updates
cowell.impact: Enabled reliable SaaS and enterprise solutions for Japanese market clients across multiple domains.

responsibilities: Contributed to Bizfly Email, an enterprise-grade bulk email delivery system
Designed and optimized MongoDB schemas for high-volume email logs and campaign configurations
Implemented scenario-based email triggers with dynamic content personalization
achievements: Built core features for enterprise bulk email delivery serving high-volume campaigns
Optimized MongoDB data models for email logs and activity tracking at scale
vccorp.impact: Built core features for enterprise bulk email delivery at Vietnam's largest media technology company.
